zh.Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England: 英國多瑟特萊謝特 馬特拉維斯
zh.Of, Woolcombe, Dorsetshire, England: 英國英格蘭多瑟特武爾可姆

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Mautravers於1238年出生在英國多瑟特萊謝特 馬特拉維斯時，他的父親John Giffard de Maltravers IV36歲，母親Mrs. John Giffard de Malttrvers IV32歲。他於1260年與Joan of Woolcombe在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1297年2月28日在英國多瑟特享年59歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Mautravers于1238年出生在英国多瑟特萊謝特 馬特拉維斯时，他的父亲John Giffard de Maltravers IV36岁，母亲Mrs. John Giffard de Malttrvers IV32岁。他于1260年与Joan of Woolcombe在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1297年2月28日在英国多瑟特享年59岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Mautravers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Matravers
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Mautravert in Chérencé-le-Héron (Manche).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Mautravers was born in 1238, in Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England, his father, John Giffard de Maltravers IV, was 36 and his mother, Mrs. John Giffard de Malttrvers IV, was 32. He married Joan of Woolcombe in 1260, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 28 February 1297, in Dorset, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Mautravers est né en 1238, à Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John Giffard de Maltravers IV, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Giffard de Malttrvers IV, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Joan of Woolcombe en 1260, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 28 février 1297, à Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Mautravers 1238 in Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Giffard de Maltravers IV 36 und seine Mutter Mrs. John Giffard de Malttrvers IV 32. Er hat 1260 in England Joan of Woolcombe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Februar 1297 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Dorset, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Mautravers è nato il nel 1238 nel Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England, il suo padre, John Giffard de Maltravers IV, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. John Giffard de Malttrvers IV, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Joan of Woolcombe nel 1260, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 febbraio 1297, nel Dorset, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Mautraversが1238年にイギリスドールセトリトチェット マトラバーズで生まれた時，父John Giffard de Maltravers IVは36歳，母Mrs. John Giffard de Malttrvers IVは32歳であった。1260年にイギリスでJoan of Woolcombeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1297年2月28日にイギリスドールセトで59歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Mautravers(이)가 1238년 영국 도르세트 리트쳇 마트레이버스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Giffard de Maltravers IV(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John Giffard de Malttrvers IV(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1260년 영국에서 Joan of Woolcombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년 2월 28일 영국 도르세트에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Mautravers nasceu em 1238, em Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Giffard de Maltravers IV, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Giffard de Malttrvers IV, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan of Woolcombe em 1260, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1297, em Dorset, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Mautravers родился в 1238 г. в местности личетт матравирс, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Giffard de Maltravers IV было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Giffard de Malttrvers IV, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan of Woolcombe в 1260 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 28 февраля 1297 г. в местности дорсет, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Mautravers nació en 1238, en Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Giffard de Maltravers IV, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mrs. John Giffard de Malttrvers IV, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Joan of Woolcombe en 1260, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1297, en Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
